allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dep=d['departures'][0]; print\('trip_id:', dep.get\('trip',{}\).get\('id'\)\); print\('route:', dep['route']['short_name']\); print\('headsign:', dep['trip']['headsign']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\('departures',[]\)[:3]; [print\(json.dumps\(x, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) for x in deps]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('block_id:', d.get\('block_id'\)\); print\('shape_id:', d.get\('shape_id'\)\); st=d.get\('stop_times',[]\); print\('first_stop:', st[0].get\('stop',{}\).get\('properties',{}\).get\('stop_name'\) if st else None\); print\('last_stop:', st[-1].get\('stop',{}\).get\('properties',{}\).get\('stop_name'\) if st else None\); print\('last_arrival:', st[-1].get\('arrival_time'\) if st else None\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=[x for x in d.get\('departures',[]\) if x.get\('route',{}\).get\('short_name'\)=='34']; print\(json.dumps\(deps[:2], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:2000]\)")
